# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About בננות בפיג'מות
A conference or event centered around bananas — whether this is a professional industry event, a fun themed gathering, or a niche community meetup related to bananas (e.g., growers, enthusiasts, exporters, or a humorous/creative event). The specific nature and tone of the event are yet to be clarified.
